creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

This appears to be a problem with the system version of 
ncurses in 3.x_STABLE.  Since 4.0-STABLE and 5.0-CURRENT's 
versions of ncurses are identical (as far as I know). 
However, if the version on 3.x-STABLE is 4.2 (as the port 
is currently at), how would you advise fixing this, at 
least in the port?  Should I upgrade to ncurses 5.0? Or..? 
Anyway, the 3.x base ncurses is ancient and unmaintained, 
but you could try and make patches to fix it.  However, 
I seriously doubt anyone's going to take the time to 
upgrade the 3.x ncurses since 3.x is quickly becoming  
obsolete.  However, thanks for your report!
